children.heading: Determinations relating to certain proliferation threat reduction projects and activities
children.label: a Determinations relating to certain proliferation threat reduction projects and activities
children.text: Any determination made before , under section 5963(a) of title 22 shall be treated as a determination under .December 19, 20141section 3712(a) of this titleSee References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Determinations relating to urgent threat reduction activities
children.label: b Determinations relating to urgent threat reduction activities
children.text: Any determination made before , under section 5965(b) of title 22 shall be treated as a determination under .December 19, 20141section 3713(b) of this title

children.heading: Funds available for Cooperative Threat Reduction Program
children.label: c Funds available for Cooperative Threat Reduction Program
children.text: Funds made available for Cooperative Threat Reduction programs pursuant to the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2013 (; ) or the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2014 (; ) that remain available for obligation as of , shall be available for the Program.Public Law 112–239126 Stat. 1632Public Law 113–66127 Stat. 672December 19, 2014
